terms.title: Imigomo Nemithetho
terms.welcome: Wamukelekile eVoyageGH. Ngokusebenzisa ithrafikhi yethu, uyavumelana nale migomo nemithetho elandelayo.
terms.s1: Ngokufinyelela nokusebenzisa iVoyageGH, uyamukela futhi uvumelana nale Migomo Nemithetho. Uma ungavumelani, sicela ungasebenzisi insizwakalo yethu.
terms.s2: IVoyageGH iyiplatifomu yokuhamisa esebenza ngeAI edala izinhlelo zokuhamisa ezilungiselwe izindawo zaseGhana. Sinikeza izinsizwakalo zokuhlela uhambo, ukubhalisa, nokuhlola.
terms.s3: Ungumuntu ozibophezelele ekugcineni ubumfihlo bemibhalo yakhini. Uyavumelana ukunikeza ulwazi olunembile nephansi uma udala i-akhawunti.
terms.s4: Yonke imibhalo ixhomeke ekutholakaleni. Intengo ikhombiswa ngeGhana Cedis (GH₵) futhi ingashintsha ngaphandle kwesaziso. Ukucubungula ukukhokha kwenziwa ngabakholideleli bethu abaphephile.
terms.s5: Ungakhansela ukubhalisa kuze kube yizinsuku ezi-48 ngaphambi kosuku lokuqala uhambo ukuze uthole imali ephelele. Ukukhansela ngaphakathi kwezinsuku ezi-48 kungase kube nefee yokukhansela.
terms.s6: Izinhlelo zokuhamisa zidala yintengiso engokwengqondo futhi kufanele zisetshenziselwe izincomo. Olunye ulwazi lungahluka. Sincoma ukunqinisa imininingwane nabahlinzeki bendawo.
terms.s7: Ngokuthumela ukuhlola, unika iVoyageGH ilayisense engokwesabelo yokusebenzisa, ukulungisa, nokubonisa okuqukethwe kokuhlola kwakho. Ukuhlola kufanele kube yiqiniso futhi kungaphuli nomthetho.
terms.s8: IVoyageGH ayibophezeleki kunoma yimiphumela evela ekusebenziseni insizwakalo yethu, kufaka phakathi kodwa kungamelwe ngaleyo, ukuphazamisa uhambo, izincomo zeAI ezinganembile, noma ukungasebenzi kwezinsizwakalo zamaqembu athathu.
terms.s9: Sigcina ilungelo lokuguqula le migomo noma nini. Ukusebenzisa insizwakalo emva kokushintsha kuyavumelana nemigomo entsha.

privacy.title: Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo
privacy.intro: Ubumfihlo bakho buyabalulekile kithi. Le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ichaza ukuthi iVoyageGH iqoqa, isebenzisa, futhi ivikelwe ulwazi lwakho olumayelana nawe.
privacy.s1: Siqoqa ulwazi onikeza sona, kufaka phakathi igama lakho, I-imeyili, nemininingwane yokubhalisa. Siqoqa futhi ulwazi lokusebenza njengamapheshana avakashelwe nokuxhumana nephrafomu yethu.
privacy.s2: Sisebenzisa ulwazi lwakho ukuze sinikeze futhi sithuthukise insizwakalo yethu, sicubungule ukubhalisa, sithumele ukunqinisa ukubhalisa, futhi sikwenze kube ngokwakho. Asithengisi ulwazi lwakho oluyimfihlo kubahlinzeki abathathu.
privacy.s3: Sisebenzisa izindlela zokuphepha ezivamile ku-industri ukuze sivikele ulwazi lwakho oluyimfihlo. Kodwa-ke, noma yisiphi isindlela sokudlulisa ngaphandle kwe-Intanethi akulungile 100% kuphephile.
privacy.s4: Sisebenzisa izinsizwakalo zamaqembu athathu (I-Clerk yokunqinisa, iPaystack yokukhokha) ezingase ziqoqe ulwazi. Inqubomgomo yobumfihlo ibusa ukusetshenziswa kwe-data yakho.
privacy.s5: Sisebenzisa amakhukhi abalulekile ukuze sigcine iseshini yakho futhi sikuthuthukise ulwazi lwakho. Ungalawula amasethingi amakhukhi ngokuncamishelwa kwebhrowza yakho.
privacy.s6: Unelungelo lokufinyelela, ukulungisa, noma ukususa ulwazi lwakho olumayelana nawe. Xhumana nathi ku-support@voyagegh.com ukuze ufake le malungelo.
privacy.s7: Insizwakalo yethu ayikhonjiselwe abantu abangaphansi kweminyaka engu-18. Asiqoqi ngokungqondo ulwazi olumayelana nezingane.
privacy.s8: Singase sibuyekeze le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ngezikhathi ezithile. Sizokwazisa ngakunye ukushintsha okubalulekile ngokubhala inqubomgomo entsha kuleli phepha.
